name: Firehouse Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Lean beef, cubed (sirloin or round steak)
16 Ounce Mashed pinto beans or refried beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon until crisp, then remove it.
2. Brown beef in the bacon grease, stirring as it cooks.
3. Sprinkle beef lightly with garlic salt (1/2 teaspoon) while cooking.
4. When all meat is browned, add onion, green pepper, and garlic. Cook until tender.
5. Add seasonings, crumbled bacon, and broth. Stir and bring to a boil.
6. Add tomatoes, chilies, peppers, and mashed beans. Simmer covered for 1-1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
7. Add kidney beans and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Mix cornmeal with cold water until smooth, then add gradually to the chili to thicken.
9. Cook until the desired consistency is reached; stir frequently.
10. Serve.
